message: Preview for mode 'pr_only' is informational only. Generate a PR bundle to review the change set.
impact_summary: After applying, all HTTP (non-HTTPS) requests to this bucket will receive a 403 Forbidden response. After applying, non-HTTPS requests to this bucket will be denied (HTTP requests receive 403).

diff_lines.label: HTTPS-only access
diff_lines.value: Deny requests with aws:SecureTransport=false (HTTP traffic blocked)

resolution.decision_rationale: Wave 2 compatibility defaulted to the single compatible profile 's3_enforce_ssl_strict_deny' for strategy 's3_enforce_ssl_strict_deny'.
